Class TimerManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.manager.TimerManager
public class TimerManager extends Object
Manages game timers for single player and multiplayer modes. Follows Single Responsibility Principle - only handles timer operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TimerManager()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    dispose()
    Stops all timers and cleans up resources.
    int
    getMultiplayerElapsedSeconds()
    Gets the elapsed time in seconds for multiplayer.
    int
    getSinglePlayerElapsedSeconds()
    Gets the elapsed time in seconds for single player.
    void
    pauseMultiplayerTimer()
    Pauses the multiplayer timer.
    void
    pauseSinglePlayerTimer()
    Pauses the single player timer.
    void
    resetMultiplayerTimer()
    Resets the multiplayer timer (stops and resets elapsed time to 0).
    void
    resetSinglePlayerTimer()
    Resets the single player timer (stops and resets elapsed time to 0).
    void
    resumeMultiplayerTimer()
    Resumes the multiplayer timer.
    void
    resumeSinglePlayerTimer()
    Resumes the single player timer.
    void
    setMultiplayerTimerLabel(javafx.scene.control.Label label)
    Sets the timer label for multiplayer mode.
    void
    setSinglePlayerTimerLabel(javafx.scene.control.Label label)
    Sets the timer label for single player mode.
    void
    startMultiplayerTimer()
    Starts the multiplayer timer.
    void
    startSinglePlayerTimer()
    Starts the single player timer.
    void
    stopMultiplayerTimer()
    Stops the multiplayer timer.
    void
    stopSinglePlayerTimer()
    Stops the single player timer.
